# DOVIX AI

> DOVIX AI engineers production-grade AI systems, autonomous agents, and enterprise automation for healthcare, finance, retail, manufacturing, and government leaders.

DOVIX AI is an enterprise AI company headquartered in Jaipur, India. We design, build, and operate frontier AI platforms — generative AI, RAG, multi-agent systems, computer vision, conversational AI, and end-to-end business automation — for global organizations.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of DOVIX AI capabilities, services, products, and industries.
- [About](/about): Company story, beliefs, and operating principles.
- [Services](/services): Full catalog of AI services — generative AI, agents, ML, computer vision, automation, and more.
- [Solutions](/solutions): Pre-architected AI playbooks and accelerators by use case.
- [Industries](/industries): Vertical-specific AI offerings across 16 sectors.
- [Products](/products): The Dovix Suite of AI-native enterprise software (CRM, ERP, Helpdesk, Analytics).
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Impact metrics and outcome-focused project summaries.
- [Portfolio](/portfolio): Visual showcase of major AI platform deployments.
- [Technologies](/technologies): Tech stack, model partners, and infrastructure ecosystem.
- [AI Research](/ai-research): Whitepapers and research on reliability, evaluations, and agents.
- [Blog](/blog): Thought leadership and engineering field notes.
- [Careers](/careers): Open roles and culture.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the DOVIX AI team — info@dovix.ai · +91 91163 82399.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions on engagements, pricing, security, and deployment.
